items.title: Claude is writing most of Anthropic's code
items.oneliner: Anthropic says Claude wrote 80% of merged code and lifted engineer success from 26% to 76%.

items.title: Google pushed Gemma 4 QAT onto devices
items.oneliner: Google's Gemma 4 QAT cuts memory enough for laptops and phones, making local multimodal agents more practical.

items.title: Nvidia released an open 550B agent model
items.oneliner: Nvidia's Nemotron 3 Ultra exposes a 550B MoE with 55B active parameters, aimed squarely at long-running agents.

items.title: Researchers described autonomous AI worms
items.oneliner: AI worms can reason on compromised hosts and spread across Linux, Windows, and IoT without commercial model APIs.

items.title: Magecart hid malware inside Stripe metadata
items.oneliner: Attackers turned Stripe into skimmer command-and-control, making checkout malware blend into trusted payment traffic.

items.title: Meta's AI chatbot exposed Instagram accounts
items.oneliner: Meta says 20,225 Instagram users were hit after its AI chatbot misrouted password resets to attackers.

items.title: Smart TVs are feeding the scraping economy
items.oneliner: Smart TVs and consumer apps are being used as residential proxies, quietly powering AI data collection at scale.

items.title: Google locked in massive rented AI compute
items.oneliner: Google will pay $920 million monthly for 110,000 Nvidia GPUs, proving frontier capacity is now a supply-chain problem.

items.title: TSMC says AI chip shortages will persist
items.oneliner: TSMC warned AI demand will exceed supply for years, so model roadmaps now depend on foundry reality.

items.title: Cloudflare acquired the VoidZero team
items.oneliner: Cloudflare bought VoidZero and pledged Vite stays neutral, signaling the AI-era toolchain stack is consolidating fast.
